---
name: New Content Request
about: Suggest a new content doc -- "My agent got burned by X"
title: "[Content] "
labels: content, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Domain:** (e.g., trading, healthcare, legal)

**Category:** (e.g., regulations, data-vendors)

**What happened?**
Describe the real-world scenario where an AI agent made a mistake due to missing domain knowledge.

**What should the agent have known?**
The specific rule, gotcha, or constraint that would have prevented the mistake.

**Sources:**
Links to documentation, regulations, or articles that confirm this knowledge.

**Severity:** (critical / high / medium / low)
